occurrence_sentence: The Quantum Technology Alliance Baden-Würt-temberg, QuantumBW for short, is an initiative that has been set up to promote quantum technology in THE LÄND — Germany's federal state of Baden-Würt-temberg.

interaction_phrase: the Competence Center Quantum Computing Baden-Württemberg (KQCBW)
occurrence_sentence: Among the flagship initiatives with a supra-regional lighthouse character that have already been or are being funded by the state — in many cases together with the federal government — are, for example, the Center for Integrated Quantum Science and Technology (IQST) based in Ulm and Stuttgart, the Competence Center Quantum Computing Baden-Württemberg (KQCBW) and the future cluster "QSens — Quantum Sensors of the Future" (part of the Clusters4Future initiative).
target_actor_key: competence center quantum computing baden w rttemberg

interaction_phrase: the future cluster "QSens — Quantum Sensors of the Future"
occurrence_sentence: Among the flagship initiatives with a supra-regional lighthouse character that have already been or are being funded by the state — in many cases together with the federal government — are, for example, the Center for Integrated Quantum Science and Technology (IQST) based in Ulm and Stuttgart, the Competence Center Quantum Computing Baden-Württemberg (KQCBW) and the future cluster "QSens — Quantum Sensors of the Future" (part of the Clusters4Future initiative).

interaction_phrase: Cyber Valley — as an international hotspot for artificial intelligence — and
occurrence_sentence: major synergies are expected between quantum computing, classic high-performance computing (HPC) and machine learning that can be optimally developed by an excellent network of super-computing centres in THE LÄND and Cyber Valley — as an international hotspot for artificial intelligence — and then exploited.

interaction_phrase: the committees within the governing body of QuantumBW — the Executive Board
occurrence_sentence: Guided by the framework of these four fields of action for the promotion of quantum technologies in Baden-Württemberg and the targets formulated in the technology roadmaps, the committees within the governing body of QuantumBW — the Executive Board, supported by the Advisory Board and the Office — will prioritize and shape concrete implementation steps and measures in a timely manner.

interaction_phrase: within the organisational structure of QuantumBW
occurrence_sentence: Within the organisational structure of QuantumBW, these roadmaps will be regularly reviewed and updated by the Executive Board, supported by the Advisory Board and the Head Office.

interaction_phrase: within the organisational structure of QuantumBW, these roadmaps will be regularly reviewed
occurrence_sentence: Within the organisational structure of QuantumBW, these roadmaps will be regularly reviewed and updated by the Executive Board, supported by the Advisory Board and the Head Office.

interaction_phrase: managed by the local universities and institutes of the Innovation Alliance Baden-Württemberg
occurrence_sentence: Low-threshold access to relevant measurement and laboratory equipment will be created for all partners at the locations and across regions; the equipment will be managed by the local universities and institutes of the Innovation Alliance Baden-Württemberg (innBW).

interaction_phrase: Access to technology at the state universities and innBW institutes for partners
occurrence_sentence: Access to technology at the state universities and innBW institutes for partners in Baden-Württemberg

interaction_phrase: in the roadmap developed by QuantumBW
occurrence_sentence: This critical aspect of quantum computer hardware is also considered in the roadmap developed by QuantumBW, without demanding the development of quantum communication be a part of Baden-Württemberg's remit.
